description: Restricted user accounts that can be invited to specific channels only, cannot access broader workspace content, and are automatically removed from a workspace when they have no remaining channel...

actors.name: System Administrator
actors.description: Configures guest policies, bulk-deactivates guests, invites guests

actors.name: Team Administrator
actors.description: Invites guests to specific channels within their team

actors.name: Guest User
actors.description: External participant with visibility limited to invited channels only

fields.name: user_id
fields.label: Unique identifier for the guest user account

fields.name: email
fields.label: Guest's email address; used for invitation and login

fields.name: invite_token
fields.label: Single-use token included in the invitation link

fields.name: allowed_domains
fields.label: Optional comma-separated email domains permitted for guest accounts; empty means

fields.name: channel_ids
fields.label: Array of channel IDs the guest is being invited to

fields.name: auth_service
fields.label: Authentication method for the guest account

fields.name: scheme_guest
fields.label: Channel membership flag marking this member as a guest role holder

values.name: invited
values.description: Invitation sent; guest has not yet accepted

values.name: active
values.description: Guest accepted invitation; account operational with channel access

values.name: deactivated
values.description: Guest account disabled; cannot log in but data preserved

transitions.description: Guest follows invitation link and completes account setup
Administrator manually deactivates guest or runs bulk deactivation
Guest is removed from their last channel in all teams, triggering automatic team removal

rules.rule_01: Guests can only see and interact with the specific channels they have been explicitly invited to; other channels are invisible to them.
rules.rule_02: When a guest is removed from their last channel within a team, they are automatically removed from that team.
rules.rule_03: Guests cannot be converted to regular members and regular members cannot be converted to guests; the roles are mutually exclusive.
rules.rule_04: A guest cannot simultaneously hold both the guest and member roles in the same team or channel.
rules.rule_05: If allowed_domains is configured, the guest's email domain must match one of the permitted domains; invitations to other domains are rejected.
rules.rule_06: Magic-link guest accounts log in via passwordless email links; links expire after a configured duration.
rules.rule_07: Deactivating a guest revokes all active sessions; message content and channel history is preserved.
rules.rule_08: Bulk guest deactivation is available as a single administrative operation affecting all guest accounts system-wide.
rules.rule_09: Invitation tokens are single-use; once accepted or expired they cannot be reused.

given: actor has permission to invite guests
guest email domain matches allowed_domains (if configured)
channel_ids list is not empty and all channels exist

then.description: Invitation record created with single-use token
Invitation email sent with link containing the invite token

guest_invited.result: Guest receives email invitation to join the specified channels

given: invite token has not been used or expired

then.description: Guest user account created with system_guest role
Guest added to each invited channel with scheme_guest flag

guest_account_created.result: Guest can access the invited channels; all other content is hidden

given: guest is removed from a channel
guest has no remaining channel memberships in this team

then.description: Guest automatically removed from the team with no channels

guest_removed_from_last_channel.result: Guest loses team access; if no teams remain, account is effectively isolated

given: actor attempts to convert a guest to a regular member or vice versa
guest_role_change_rejected.result: Role change rejected; accounts must be managed through proper invitation flows

given: guest email domain does not match any permitted domain

then.description: All sessions for all guest accounts revoked

bulk_guest_deactivation.result: All guest accounts deactivated system-wide; existing sessions terminated

errors.message: Guests from that email domain are not permitted on this server.
Guest and member roles cannot be converted between each other.
This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
The guest account limit for this server has been reached.

events.name: guest.invited
events.description: Invitation sent to a guest user

events.name: guest.joined
events.description: Guest accepted invitation and created their account

events.name: guest.auto_removed_from_team
events.description: Guest automatically removed from team after leaving last channel

events.name: guest.bulk_deactivated
events.description: All guest accounts deactivated in a single administrative operation

related.reason: Guest accounts are used to grant scoped access to rooms through the guest room access feature
Guests are scoped to specific teams and auto-removed when channel-less
The guest role determines restricted default permissions
Invitation delivery relies on email notification infrastructure

goals.description: Restricted user accounts that can be invited to specific channels only, cannot access broader workspace content, and are automatically removed from a workspace when they have no remaining channel...

constraints.description: Sensitive fields must be encrypted at rest and never logged in plaintext

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: access control must enforce least-privilege principle

invariants: sensitive fields are never logged in plaintext
all data access is authenticated and authorized
error messages never expose internal system details
state transitions follow the defined state machine — no illegal transitions
